title: curio citriformis
intro: Curio citriformis, also known as Lemon Ironwood or Lemon Ironbark, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Curio citriformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Curio citriformis can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in natural medicine.
